briefdescription.para: Performs a dynamic cast on a SharedPtr.

detaileddescription.para: Creates a new SharedPtr that manages the same object but with a different pointer type obtained via dynamic_cast. The returned SharedPtr shares ownership with the original.

@SINCE_2_5.22
To
The target pointer type
From
The source pointer type
from
The source SharedPtr
A SharedPtr<To> managing the cast pointer, or empty SharedPtr if cast fails

briefdescription.para: Constructor that manages the given pointer. @SINCE_2_5.16.

parameterdescription.para: Raw pointer to take ownership of

briefdescription.para: Converting copy constructor from derived type.

detaileddescription.para: Constructs a SharedPtr<Base> from a SharedPtr<Derived>.

@SINCE_2_5.16
U
The derived type
other
The derived SharedPtr to move from
Enabled only if U* is convertible to Type*

briefdescription.para: Converting move constructor from derived type.

detaileddescription.para: Constructs a SharedPtr<Base> from a SharedPtr<Derived>.

@SINCE_2_5.16
U
The derived type
other
The derived SharedPtr to move from
Enabled only if U* is convertible to Type*

briefdescription.para: Converting copy assignment operator from derived type.

detaileddescription.para: Assigns a SharedPtr<Base> from a SharedPtr<Derived>.

@SINCE_2_5.16
U
The derived type
other
The derived SharedPtr to move from
Reference to this object
Enabled only if U* is convertible to Type*

briefdescription.para: Converting move assignment operator from derived type.

detaileddescription.para: Assigns a SharedPtr<Base> from a SharedPtr<Derived>.

@SINCE_2_5.11
U
The derived type
other
The derived SharedPtr to move from
Reference to this object
Enabled only if U* is convertible to Type*

simplesect.para: A const reference to the object
A pointer to a const object

briefdescription.para: Check if the SharedPtr is empty (null). @SINCE_2_5.16.

simplesect.para: true if the SharedPtr is empty

briefdescription.para: Get the raw pointer to the managed object. @SINCE_2_5.16.

simplesect.para: The raw pointer to the object

briefdescription.para: Get the raw pointer to const object. @SINCE_2_5.16.

simplesect.para: The raw pointer to the const object

briefdescription.para: Get the number of SharedPtr objects referring to the same managed object. @SINCE_2_5.16.

parameterdescription.para: The object to take ownership of

briefdescription.para: Constructor for sharing control block from another SharedPtr.

parameterdescription.para: If true, increment the strong count

briefdescription.para: Helper function to reset the internal state.
Templated shared pointer class with a default deleter.
